content.query:
SecureBoot_Certificate_CL
//| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber_s
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceName_s
| summarize Total = count()
| extend Result = strcat(Total, " devices")
| project Result
content.title: 💻 Devices count

content.query:
SecureBoot_Certificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber_s
| summarize Total = count(),UpToDate = countif(CertActiveDB_b == "True" and UEFICA2023Status_s == "Updated" and IsSecureBootEnabled_b == "True" and WindowsUEFICA2023Capable_d == 2)
| extend Percentage = round(UpToDate * 100.0 / Total, 2)
| extend Result = strcat( Percentage, "% devices")
| project Result
content.title: ✅ Devices UpToDate

content.query:
SecureBoot_Certificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber_s
| where isnotempty(CertDefaultDB_b)
| where Manufacturer_s !contains "Microsoft"
| summarize Total = count(),UpToDate = countif(CertDefaultDB_b == "True")
| extend Percentage = round(UpToDate * 100.0 / Total, 2)
| extend Result = strcat( Percentage, "% devices")
| project Result
content.title: 🚀 Minimum BIOS uptodate

content.query:
SecureBoot_Certificate_CL
| where isnotempty(Manufacturer_s)
| where Manufacturer_s !contains "OEMCT"
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Manufacturer_s
| summarize Total = count()
| extend Result = strcat( Total, " manufacturer(s)")
| project Result
content.title: 👷🏼‍♂️ Manufacturer count

content.query:
SecureBoot_Certificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber_s
| extend UpToDate_Devices = UEFICA2023Status_s == "Updated" and WindowsUEFICA2023Capable_d == 2
| summarize SecureBoot_Certificate_CL = count() by tostring(UpToDate_Devices)
content.title: Secure Boot certificate global status

content.query:
SecureBoot_Certificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber_s
| where isnotempty(CertDefaultDB_b)
| where Manufacturer_s !contains "Microsoft"
| summarize SecureBoot_Certificate_CL = count() by tostring(CertDefaultDB_b)
content.title: BIOS minimum update status for certificate

content.query:
SecureBoot_Certificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber_s
| where isnotempty(CertActiveDB_b)
| summarize SecureBoot_Certificate_CL = count() by tostring(CertActiveDB_b)
content.title: Certificate found in ActiveDB

content.query:
SecureBoot_Certificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber_s
| where isnotempty(IsSecureBootEnabled_b)
| summarize Count = count() by tostring(IsSecureBootEnabled_b)
content.title: Secure Boot status

content.query:
SecureBoot_Certificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber_s
| where isnotempty(SecureBootTaskStatus_s)
| summarize SecureBoot_Certificate_CL = count() by tostring(SecureBootTaskStatus_s)
content.title: Secure Boot update scheduled task status

content.query:
SecureBoot_Certificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber_s
| where isnotempty(UEFICA2023Status_s)
| summarize SecureBoot_Certificate_CL = count() by tostring(UEFICA2023Status_s)
content.title: UEFICA2023 cert deployment status

content.query:
SecureBoot_Certificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber_s
| where isnotempty(Manufacturer_s)
| where Manufacturer_s !contains "OEMCT"
| where CertDefaultDB_b == "False"
| summarize ['Devices count'] = count() by ['Manufacturer']=Manufacturer_s,Model=ModelFriendlyName_s
| order by ['Devices count']
content.title: ❌ Models requiring BIOS update

content.query:
SecureBoot_Certificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber_s
| where isnotempty(Manufacturer_s)
| where Manufacturer_s !contains "OEMCT"
| where CertDefaultDB_b == "True"
| summarize ['Devices count'] = count() by ['Manufacturer']=Manufacturer_s,Model=ModelFriendlyName_s
| order by ['Devices count']
content.title: ✔️ Models with BIOS uptodate

content.query:
SecureBoot_Certificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber_s
| where isnotempty(Manufacturer_s)
| where Manufacturer_s !contains "OEMCT"
| where CertActiveDB_b == "False"
| summarize ['Devices count'] = count() by ['Manufacturer']=Manufacturer_s,Model=ModelFriendlyName_s
| order by ['Devices count']
content.title: ❌ Models requiring certificate update

content.query:
SecureBoot_Certificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber_s
| where isnotempty(Manufacturer_s)
| where Manufacturer_s !contains "OEMCT"
| where CertActiveDB_b == "True"
| summarize ['Devices count'] = count() by ['Manufacturer']=Manufacturer_s,Model=ModelFriendlyName_s
| order by ['Devices count']
content.title: ✔️ Models with certificate uptodate

content.json:
Here we check the registry key UEFICA2023Status located in "HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\SecureBoot\Servicing".

The "Deployment status" corresponding to "UEFICA2023Status" has 3 values: - Updated: The Secure Boot CA 2023 update complete. No action needed on your side. - InProgress: The update is actively in progress. Waiting for a reboot or scheduled task execution. - NoStarted: The deployment is planned, but the update has not yet run.

content.query:
SecureBoot_Certificate_CL
| where UEFICA2023Status_s contains "{UEFICA2023Status}"
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber_s
| where UEFICA2023Status_s <> "Updated" 
| where IsSecureBootEnabled_b == "True"
| where "{ComputerName:escape}" == "*" or DeviceName_s contains "{ComputerName:escape}" or "{ComputerName:escape}" == "All devices"
| project Device=DeviceName_s,['Deployment status']=UEFICA2023Status_s,SerialNumber=SerialNumber_s,Manufacturer=Manufacturer_s,Model=ModelFriendlyName_s,CertActiveDB_b,WindowsUEFICA2023Capable=WindowsUEFICA2023Capable_d,LatestEventId_d

content.json:
Here we check the value from the below command: (Get-SecureBootUEFI dbdefault).bytes

The return of this command has 2 values: - True: uptodate - False: not uptodate

content.query:
SecureBoot_Certificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber_s
| where isnotempty(CertDefaultDB_b)
| where Manufacturer_s !contains "Microsoft"
| where CertDefaultDB_b == "False"
| where "{ComputerName:escape}" == "*" or DeviceName_s contains "{ComputerName:escape}" or "{ComputerName:escape}" == "All devices"
| project Device=DeviceName_s,SN=SerialNumber_s,Manufacturer=Manufacturer_s,Model=ModelFriendlyName_s,['BIOS version']=BIOSVersion_s,['BIOS date']=BIOSReleaseDate_t,CertActiveDB_b,['Deployment status']=UEFICA2023Status_s,['Deployment status info']=UEFICA2023Status_Label_s

SecureBoot_Certificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber_s
| where isnotempty(IsSecureBootEnabled_b)
| where IsSecureBootEnabled_b == "False"
| where "{ComputerName:escape}" == "*" or DeviceName_s contains "{ComputerName:escape}" or "{ComputerName:escape}" == "All devices"
| project Device=DeviceName_s,SN=SerialNumber_s,Mzanufacturer=Manufacturer_s,Model=ModelFriendlyName_s,['Cert deployment status']=UEFICA2023Status_s,['Cert deployment status label']=UEFICA2023Status_Label_s
content.title: Devices with Secure Boot disabled

content.query:
SecureBoot_Certificate_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by SerialNumber_s
| where "{ComputerName:escape}" == "*" or DeviceName_s contains "{ComputerName:escape}" or "{ComputerName:escape}" == "All devices"
| project DeviceName_s,SerialNumber_s,IsSecureBootEnabled_b,Model_s,ModelFriendlyName_s,CertActiveDB_b,CertDefaultDB_b,Manufacturer_s,BIOSVersion_s,UEFICA2023Status_s,WindowsUEFICA2023Capable_d,UEFICA2023Status_Label_s,LatestEventId_d,RebootPending_b,BIOSReleaseDate_t,BIOSReleaseDateDaysOld_d,SMBIOSBIOSVersion_s,OS_Build_s,OSInstallDate_t,OSVersion_s,DeviceUptime_t,AvailableUpdates_Convert_Hex_s,MicrosoftUpdateManagedOptIn_Value_d,HighConfidenceOptOut_Value_d,Event1795Count_d,Event1796Count_d,Event1800Count_d,Event1801Count_d,Event1802Count_d,Event1803Count_d,Event1808Count_d,MissingKEK_b
content.title: All devices details

content.json:
The data is collected and sent through an Intune remediation script.
The remediation script is executed every day. **Certificate state**
Here we check the deployment status of the certificate using the below registry key: HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\SecureBoot\Servicing\UEFICA2023Status **BIOS check**
In this part, we check the result of the following command: ([System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString((Get-SecureBootUEFI dbdefault).bytes) -match 'Windows UEFI CA 2023')
This command allows you to check if the dbdefault contains the "Windows UEFI CA 2023" cert.

It can be True or False: - True: the device has the minimum BIOS version that - False: the device does not have the minimum BIOS version **Secure boot status**
In this part, we check devices with secure boot enabled or not.
Secure boot is a prerequisite for the certificate update. **Secure boot scheduled task**
In this part, we check the status of the "Secure-Boot-Update" scheduled task. **Event logs**
In this part, we check event IDs in the System event log.
- 1801: Update initiated, reboot required
- 1808: Update completed successfully
- 1795: Firmware returned error
- 1796: Error logged with error code
- 1800: Reboot needed
- 1802: Known firmware issue blocked update
- 1803: Matching KEK update not found
